title: Smart Study Assistant
description: Turn pasted notes or textbook text into summaries, key points, and practice questions with Python, Streamlit, and the OpenAI API—beginner-friendly active recall in one step.

title: Smart Q&A Bot for Your Notes
description: Turn personal notes into an interactive Q&A system: chunk and overlap text, embed locally with Hugging Face, store in Chroma, and answer with LangChain RAG and Groq—no embedding API key.

title: AI Email Reply Generator
description: Paste an email, pick a tone (Formal, Friendly, Short), and get a Groq-powered draft reply—Express API plus vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, no frontend build.

title: Resume & Cover Letter Improver
description: Beginner-friendly project: resume plus job description for AI feedback (strengths, gaps, STAR bullets, ATS keywords) and a tailored cover letter—Python, Streamlit, Groq API, and pypdf.

title: Website RAG Chatbot
description: Intermediate project: paste a URL to scrape, chunk, and embed page text locally (Hugging Face + Chroma), then chat via LangChain RAG and Groq—Python and Streamlit.

title: AI Product Description Generator
description: Beginner-friendly project that turns structured product inputs into descriptions, taglines, social blurbs, and benefit-led bullets using Python, Streamlit, and the Groq API.

title: Personal Study Tutor
description: RAG-based tutor that indexes your PDFs and notes locally, answers questions from your material, and generates quizzes for active recall—LangChain, Chroma, Hugging Face embeddings, and Groq.

title: Resume + Job Match Optimizer
description: Upload a resume and job description to get a fit score (0–100), keyword gap analysis, improvement suggestions with STAR rewrites, and a tailored cover letter—Python, Streamlit, and Groq.

title: AI Coding Pair Programmer
description: Paste code or pseudocode and choose an action: step-by-step explanation, bug detection with fixes, pseudocode-to-working-code conversion, or a scored code review—Python, Streamlit, and Groq.

title: Meeting & Lecture Summarizer
description: Paste or upload any transcript to extract a TL;DR, key decisions, and a formatted action-item table—then ask follow-up questions via a built-in chat interface. Python, Streamlit, and Groq.

title: Personalized News Digest
description: Select topics, pick a reading tone (beginner-friendly / technical / executive brief), and get a curated daily digest pulled from live RSS feeds and summarized by Groq—Python, Streamlit, feedparser.

title: Customer Support Agent Simulator
description: Upload your product docs or FAQ, then chat with an AI support agent that answers only from your documentation and automatically escalates questions it cannot answer—RAG, LangChain, Chroma, Groq.

title: AI Debate Partner
description: Pick a topic, assign sides, and engage in a structured debate where the AI argues its position, rebuts your points, and a judge scores both sides at the end—Python, Streamlit, and Groq.

title: Travel Planner Agent
description: Enter destination, budget, travel style, and interests to get a day-by-day itinerary with hotel picks, food recommendations, and transport options—then refine via a follow-up chat. Python, Streamlit, Groq.

title: Mental Model & Learning Coach
description: Apply frameworks like First Principles, Inversion, or SWOT to real problems, learn any mental model with examples, or get guided journaling prompts—three modes, twelve frameworks, Python, Streamlit, Groq.
